title: Section 32
body: Section 32 in The Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 32. Penalty for default .- The Court may compel the attendance of any person to whom a summons has been issued under section 30 and for that purpose may- (a) issue a warrant for his arrest; (b) attach and sell his property; (c) impose a fine upon him [not exceeding five thousand rupees]; (d) order him to furnish security for his appearance and in default commit him to the civil prison. Judgment and decree
